metadata.description: Public AI coding tool plugin marketplace — safety, quality, and productivity plugins for Claude Code and compatible tools

plugins.name: bash-guardrails
plugins.description: Safety guardrails for Claude Code's Bash tool — blocks compound commands, enforces safe patterns, auto-approves known-safe operations

plugins.name: mdlint
plugins.description: Auto-format and lint markdown files written by Claude Code — prettier + markdownlint on every Write/Edit, with a Stop hook safety net
